name: Barrier Tattoo (Medium)
description:
Produced by a special needle, this magic tattoo depicts protective imagery and uses ink that resembles liquid metal.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Tattoo Attunement", "entries": ["To attune to this item, you hold the needle to your skin where you want the tattoo to appear, pressing the needle there throughout the attunement process.
